legendary_weapons.name: 北方巨人巨斧
legendary_weapons.desc: 每次[普通攻击]还会额外造成相当于50%武器伤害的冰霜伤害，并有3%几率冻结目标。
legendary_weapons.descEn: Each [Basic Attack] also deals 50% of Weapon Damage as Cold Damage, with a 3% chance to Freeze the target on hit.

legendary_weapons.name: 地狱风暴之锤
legendary_weapons.desc: 每使用10次 [普通攻击] 技能，召唤一道闪电打击随机敌人，造成相当于1000%武器伤害的闪电伤害。
legendary_weapons.descEn: Every 10 [Basic Attack] Abilities used, summons a Lightning Strike that deals 1000% Weapon Damage as Lightning Damage to a random enemy.

legendary_weapons.name: 苦痛锯齿巨剑
legendary_weapons.desc: 对易伤目标额外获得30%暴击几率。
legendary_weapons.descEn: Additional 30% Critical Chance against Vulnerable targets.

legendary_weapons.name: 霜龙法杖
legendary_weapons.desc: 冰碎片命中后弹射至1个额外敌人。
legendary_weapons.descEn: Ice Shards deflect to 1 additional enemy on hit.

legendary_armor.name: 唤风者之靴
legendary_armor.descEn: +50% Movement Speed for 4 seconds after a kill.

legendary_armor.name: 暴怒壁垒
legendary_armor.desc: 若怒气护盾在结束前未被打破，结束时对周围敌人造成相当于你最大生命值100%的物理伤害。
legendary_armor.descEn: If Rage Shield is not broken before expiration, deal 100% of your Max Health as Physical Damage to surrounding enemies upon expiration.

legendary_armor.name: 荆棘之心护胸甲
legendary_armor.desc: 荆棘造成的伤害提高500%，但失去20%最大生命值。
legendary_armor.descEn: Damage dealt by Thorns is increased by 500%, but you lose 20% Max Health.

legendary_armor.name: 符文守护法衣
legendary_armor.desc: 受到敌人暴击时，获得基于你最大生命值的精神护盾。（冷却8秒）
legendary_armor.descEn: When struck by an enemy critical hit, gain a Spirit Shield based on your Max Health. (8s cooldown)

legendary_armor.name: 堕落王冠
legendary_armor.descEn: +30% Attack Speed for 3 seconds after a kill.

legendary_armor.name: 绯红风暴之兜
legendary_armor.desc: 旋风斩每次命中有几率施加[流血]。
legendary_armor.descEn: Whirlwind has a chance to inflict [Bleeding] on each hit.

legendary_armor.name: 坚毅药剂护胫
legendary_armor.desc: 饮用生命药水后，5秒内获得30%伤害减免。
legendary_armor.descEn: Gain 30% Damage Reduction for 5 seconds after consuming Health Potion.

legendary_armor.name: 甲壳尖刺护肩
legendary_armor.descEn: 10% of your Armor also contributes to Thorns.

legendary_armor.name: 元素爆发护肩
legendary_armor.desc: 使用[强力攻击]技能后，6秒内火焰伤害和闪电伤害+50%。
legendary_armor.descEn: After using a [Strong Attack] Ability, gain +50% Fire and Lightning Damage for 6 seconds.

legendary_armor.name: 怒火护手
legendary_armor.desc: 烈焰打击有30%几率不消耗法力。
legendary_armor.descEn: Flame Strike has a 30% chance to cost no Mana.

legendary_armor.name: 势不可挡护手
legendary_armor.desc: 技能每次命中获得1%护甲，持续5秒。（最多叠加100层）
legendary_armor.descEn: Each Ability hit grants 1% Armor for 5 seconds. (Max 100 stacks)

consumables.name: 初级生命药水
consumables.desc: 立即恢复25点生命，随后3秒内恢复30%最大生命值。

consumables.name: 中级生命药水
consumables.desc: 立即恢复50点生命，随后3秒内恢复30%最大生命值。

consumables.name: 高级生命药水
consumables.desc: 立即恢复100点生命，随后3秒内恢复35%最大生命值。

consumables.name: 超级生命药水
consumables.desc: 立即恢复300点生命，随后3秒内恢复35%最大生命值。

chests.name: 镀金宝箱
chests.desc: 开启后获得若干物品，有几率获得传说品质装备。

chests.name: 璀璨镀金宝箱
chests.desc: 开启后获得大量物品，有几率获得传说或神圣品质装备。

materials.name: 恶魔头骨
materials.desc: 从恶魔身上获得的坚硬头骨，可用于制作药剂和装备强化。

materials.name: 星叶草
materials.desc: 夜晚会发出微光的稀有草药，用于炼金术制作。

materials.name: 橡树叶
materials.desc: 国王森林常见的橡树叶，基础炼金材料。

materials.name: 铁矿石
materials.desc: 基础矿石，用于武器和防具强化。

materials.name: 蘑菇
materials.desc: 潮湿地区常见的蘑菇，可用于炼制基础药水。

materials.name: 金矿石
materials.desc: 稀有矿石，用于高级装备制作。

materials.name: 沙漠玫瑰
materials.desc: 塔赞荒漠特有的植物，稀有炼金材料。

materials.name: 诅咒精华碎片
materials.desc: 从黑暗生物身上采集的诅咒精华碎片，用于装备强化。

materials.name: 镀金宝箱
materials.desc: 开启后获得若干物品，可能含有宝石和银色装备。

materials.name: 黄金宝箱
materials.desc: 稀有宝箱，开启后可能获得金宝石和金色传说装备。

materials.name: 金宝石
materials.desc: 金色宝石，仅从黄金宝箱中获得，用于高级宝石镶嵌。

materials.name: 银宝石
materials.desc: 银色宝石，仅从镀金宝箱和黄金宝箱中获得，用于中级宝石镶嵌。
materials.source: 镀金宝箱 / 黄金宝箱

random_boxes.name: 神秘武器盒
random_boxes.desc: 随机获得一件普通到传说品质武器。

boots.name: 唤风者之靴
boots.descEn: +50% Movement Speed for 4 seconds after a kill.

chest.name: 暴怒壁垒
chest.desc: 若怒气护盾在结束前未被打破，结束时对周围敌人造成相当于你最大生命值100%的物理伤害。
chest.descEn: If Rage Shield is not broken before expiration, deal 100% of your Max Health as Physical Damage to surrounding enemies upon expiration.

chest.descEn: When struck by an enemy critical hit, gain a Spirit Shield based on your Max Health. (8s cooldown)

helm.descEn: Whirlwind has a chance to inflict [Bleeding] on each hit.

necklace.name: 涌动心智吊坠
necklace.desc: 每消耗100点法力，4秒内暴击几率+20%。
necklace.descEn: Every 100 Mana spent, +20% Critical Hit Chance for 4 seconds.

necklace.name: 裂创怒吼吊坠
necklace.desc: 怒吼将立即引爆周围敌人身上残余的[流血]伤害。
necklace.descEn: Rage Shout will trigger remaining [Bleeding] damage on surrounding enemies instantly.

necklace.name: 火焰领主项链
necklace.desc: 火元素将额外召唤一个火元素。
necklace.descEn: Fire Elemental will summon one additional Fire Elemental.

legs.name: 坚毅药剂护胫
legs.desc: 饮用生命药水后，5秒内获得30%伤害减免。
legs.descEn: Gain 30% Damage Reduction for 5 seconds after consuming Health Potion.

ring.name: 巨龙血牙印戒
ring.desc: 半月打击将额外掷出两道月牙刃。
ring.descEn: Half Moon Strike will hurl two additional crescent blades.

ring.name: 展露之戒
ring.desc: 静止不动时，每秒获得+10%普通攻击伤害，最多叠加20层。
ring.descEn: While standing still, gain +10% Basic Attack Damage every second, stacking up to 20 times.
